title: NBJA
text:
Embrace the National Bike Jousting Association. When your life needs a dash of absurdity, wear it on a shirt. Because who needs real sports when you can look like you endorse a completely made-up one? Tell us if the reference lands.

#BikeJousting #AbsurdSports

title: Beer Is Proof
text:
For those who stopped waiting for divine intervention and just started brewing. Raise a glass to reality, not superstition. Tell us if the reference lands.

#BeerTruth #ScienceOverFaith

title: Del Sol Searchin'
text:
Because if you're going to contemplate life's existential mysteries, you might as well do it from the driver’s seat of a ’90s classic. Let’s get lost.

#DelSolSearchin #90sVibes #HondaHumor Tell us if the reference lands.

#DelSolSearchin #90sVibes

title: Whip It
text:
When life hands you problems, don't just "Whip It"—look stylish while avoiding the brain gridlock. This shirt's got your sarcasm covered. Perfect for those who prefer their humor like their music: a bit twisted and unmistakably sharp. Tell us if the reference lands.

#DEVO #MusicPun

title: El Tenedor del Diablo
text:
For the unrepentant fans of 80s adventure schlock: wear your map to hidden gems proudly. Just remember, the real treasure is the friends we made along the way—after we took their stuff. #MovieMemorabilia #ElTenedorDelDiablo Tell us if the reference lands.

#RomancingTheStone #80sMovies

title: Priapism
text:
Because who doesn’t want to advertise their underwhelming afflictions? Wear this and let everyone know you're ready for some awkward conversations. #Priapism #ClinicalChic #DarkHumor Tell us if the reference lands.

#Priapism #ClinicalChic

title: See You Later Crocodile
text:
Because calling it a croc adds instant absurdity. Aim for confusion when you can, right? Tell us if the reference lands.

#PunIntended #CrocodileConfusion

title: Coloradans Against Hiking
text:
For Coloradans who prefer couch trails over mountain trails. Wear this and let the real locals know you have absolutely no interest in doing the 'scenic' thing. Because life’s too short for blisters. Tell us if the reference lands.

#ColoradansAgainst #NotHiking

title: Breaking Wind
text: For fans who can really appreciate the chemistry of comedy. #BreakingWind #BreakingBad

title: Michael Garrett Cullen Jason
text:
Because nothing says 'Olympic-level talent' like wearing the names of heroes trying not to sink. For fans of the infamous 4x100 medley, this shirt is a reminder that glory is a team sport—even if your team is a few laps behind. Tell us if the reference lands.

#SwimFast #OlympicDreams

title: I Just Crapped Myself
text:
Nothing says 'I bet it all' like this shirt. Perfect for high-stakes toilet humor fans who don't mind a little mess on the side. Wear your loss proudly; it’s a gamble you won’t regret... or will you? Tell us if the reference lands.

#BathroomHumor #CrapsTable

title: Aesop's Fables
text:
Because if we're teaching fairytales in science class, we might as well throw in a talking fox. Let's keep the absurdity equal, shall we? Tell us if the reference lands.

#PoliticalSatire #SecularEducation

title: No Yo In Equipo
text:
Sure, there's no "I" in team—but there’s definitely a "yo." For those who know that sometimes the best plays are made in Spanglish. Sport your bilingual sarcasm and remind them who’s really running the field. Tell us if the reference lands.

#SpanglishSwag #BilingualHumor

title: Rising Star was dead in a week
text:
Rising Star? More like Rising Dead. Spoilers for The Electric Horseman: the wilderness isn’t exactly a horse’s best friend. Wear this and let everyone know you prefer your horses well-dressed and in good company. 🌵🐴 Tell us if the reference lands.

#TheElectricHorseman #CultClassics

title: Beer Is Proof
text:

title: My Other Car Is A Boat
text:

#BoatLife #NauticalNonsense
